title: laelia × pilcheri
intro: Laelia × pilcheri, also known as the Pilcher's Orchid, is a hybrid plant species of the orchid family, resulting from the cross between Laelia albida and Cattleya warscewiczii. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Laelia × pilcheri include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat various skin conditions. It is often used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be administered orally or applied topically to harness its medicinal properties.
